Entries.Name: Quebec Kweebec
Entries.Line: It's complicated. All of it. His obsession with France and his... I guess, aspiration to be *French* French.

Entries.Name: Quebec Kweebec
Entries.Line: It's his own business, so he should be the one to tell you. But I know from experience that he'll never get to it.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: He puts his plate away somewhere in this clutter, and sighs. For a while, there's no sound but that of him scratching his forehead.

Entries.Name: Quebec Kweebec
Entries.Line: You've been talking a lot lately, so I guess that I should be honest about the whole situation. I know that I just compared it to some kind of a performance, but Canuck Kweebec is actually very genuine about what he's doing. In his own way.

Entries.Name: Quebec Kweebec
Entries.Line: His feelings on our homeland are complicated, like I said. Some of it for a good reason, some of it for... well, because he had a lot of time to overthink a few things, to put it mildly. And no one to challenge him on it.

Entries.Name: Quebec Kweebec
Entries.Line: I do what I can, but we've spent a decade like this. He probably needs to hear it from someone... how do I say it, external.

Line.Text: Let me give you an example of how bad it is.
